case_title: LAU, BEATRICE vs. MILLER, SHARON et al

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION AND ORDER TO SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT JUDGMENT OF JUN-14-1993 SET ASIDE

MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF LAU, BEATRICE COURT TRIAL SET FOR JUN-08-1993 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 01 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

DEPT.#1, JUDGE HERBERT DONALDSON. C/C FOR CT. TRIAL. PL. PRESENT W/ATTY. DEF. DENISE BURGESS IN PRO PER & NOT PRESENT PL. WIT, BEATRICE LAU, S&E AND EXH ENTERED. JUDGMENT FOR PL. WITH REST. OF PREMISES AT 786 SANTIAGO ST, FORF. LEASE AGREEMENT, $2,259.13 R&D, $233 ATTY FEES, COSTS WVD. EXH. RETURNED.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LAU, BEATRICE SERVED MAY-11-1993, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BURGESS, DENISE
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS FILED BY PLAINTIFF LAU, BEATRICE AS TO DEFENDANT BURGESS, DENISE

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LAU, BEATRICE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BURGESS, DENISE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 786 SANTIAGO ST $2,900.13 RENT, $233.00 ATTORNEY FEES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,133.13, LEASE FORFEITED, JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANTS MILLER AND JONES VACATED, AND A DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE IS TO ENTER AS TO SAID DEFENDANTS ONLY; JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT BURGESS REMAINS IN FULL FORCE AND EFFECT. PURSUANT TO COURT ORDER OF 03-NOV-97.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MILLER, SHARON JONES, PRISCILLA BURGESS, DENISE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 786 SANTIAGO ST, S.F, CA. $2,900.13 RENT, $233.00 ATTORNEY FEES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,133.13, LEASE FORFEITED, SHARON MILLER TO PAY $258 & PRISCILLA JONES TO PAY $383 & JUDGMENT TO BE VACATED - DENISE BURGESS TO PAY $2,259.13 W/$233 ATTY FEES. SEE FILE FOR FURTHER DETAILS.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
